caption: A woman with dark hair and wearing black over-ear headphones sits in front of a light-colored wall and a pale yellow curtain. She is wearing a grey and white vertically striped button-down shirt. In the bottom left corner of each scene, the text "Nancy Ramya" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions shift. In the first instance, she has an attentive expression with her eyes open and mouth slightly parted. She then closes her eyes and continues speaking, her mouth moving. By the final frames, her eyes are open again, and she maintains a speaking posture with varied mouth movements and facial muscle contractions, suggesting active conversation. The background and her position remain static throughout the clip.
